=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Hamilton, Ontario, Canada
Hamilton Place
21 August 1992

This recording has the drops described for the LB0795 (d2t4 0:05),(d2t7 3:40). I received it in a trade with the folder renamed as R.C. remaster.


disc 1
1. Don't Let Your Deal Go Down (trad.)
2. Pretty Peggy-O (trad. arr. Bob Dylan)
3. All Along The Watchtower
4. Tangled Up In Blue
5. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
6. Simple Twist Of Fate
7. Everything Is Broken
8. Little Moses (Bert A. Williams/Earle C. Jones)
9. Boots Of Spanish Leather
10. The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
11. Mr. Tambourine Man

disc 2
1. Cat's In The Well
2. The Times They Are A-Changin'
3. Idiot Wind
4. Maggie's Farm
5. What Good Am I?
6. Highway 61 Revisited
7. It Ain't Me, Babe
